holdings.infoBox: AUSF is an equity ETF with a total of 197 individual holdings. The top holdings are Verizon Communications stock at 2.00%, Cisco Systems at 1.99%, AT&T Inc. at 1.73%, Royalty Pharma at 1.63%, and Linde at 1.57%.

overview.description: The Global X Adaptive U.S. Factor ETF (AUSF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks with exposure to value, momentum, and/or low volatility factors. Factor exposure is determined by the recent performance of each factor. AUSF was launched on Aug 24, 2018 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Adaptive Wealth Strategies U.S. Factor Index
